# API Checklist: Toggle Open-Data Layers in the Map UI

**Purpose**: Validate layer data API contracts.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/025-open-data-layers/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Request Contract

- [x] CHK-API-001 Layer endpoint accepts layer ID, bbox, and zoom.
- [x] CHK-API-002 Request validation rejects invalid layer or bbox.

## Response Contract

- [x] CHK-API-003 Response includes features and coverage status.
- [x] CHK-API-004 Response supports partial coverage.

## Error States

- [x] CHK-API-005 API outage returns HTTP 503.
